summary: Completed testing of Blog System new features: Featured images, GPT Image 1 integration, blog uploads static file serving. All backend APIs pass (22/23 tests, 1 skipped). Frontend UI fully functional with featured images displaying correctly on public blog and blog post pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Featured image generation via emergentintegrations.llm.openai.image_generation.OpenAIImageGeneration works correctly
Blog uploads served correctly at /api/blog/uploads/ via FastAPI StaticFiles mount
Published posts include featured_image field (null or /api/blog/uploads/{filename}.png)
BlogPage.jsx displays featured images in card view with proper fallback when null
BlogPostPage.jsx displays full-width featured image with og:image meta tag
seed_data_creation: 4 blog posts (2 published, 2 pending). DPDP post has featured_image at /api/blog/uploads/07011d528ec4.png
context_for_next_testing_agent: Featured image generation working. Image saved to /app/backend/uploads/blog/ and served via /api/blog/uploads/{filename}. POST /api/blog/generate takes 2-3 min (research + article + image) - skip in automated tests.

FEATURED_IMAGES_IN_API.result: featured_image field present, valid path /api/blog/uploads/*.png, static files served with content-type image/png

BLOG_SETTINGS.result: auto_generate_enabled, posts_per_week (1-7), preferred_days, preferred_hour all working

elements_verified: CTA section (Get Support, View AMC Plans)

playwright_test_results.public_blog_page: PASSED - 2 published posts, search, categories, featured image on DPDP post
playwright_test_results.blog_post_page: PASSED - Title, featured image, breadcrumbs, FAQs (4), tags (5), CTA
playwright_test_results.blog_admin_login: PASSED - Login and navigate to blog-admin
playwright_test_results.settings_panel: PASSED - All settings controls visible and functional
